title: Expedia Stock Down 46% YTD, Can It Rebound?
text: EXPE stock has declined from around $185 to $97 YTD, underperforming the broader indices, with the S&P falling about 18% over the same period.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy to Profit from the Political Uncertainty
text: Pending the runoff election in Georgia, Americans now have clarity on the balance of power in Washington, D.C. for the next two years.

title: Just How Hot is the Travel Market?
text: The travel industry was hit harder than most others during the pandemic and it appears that the recovery has legs.

title: Expedia (EXPE) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Expedia's (EXPE) third-quarter 2022 results reflect strengthening travel demand despite the macroeconomic headwinds.

title: Why Expedia Stock Gained Today
text: Shares of the online travel agency rose on a strong earnings report.

title: Expedia Group, Inc. (EXPE) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 3, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Harshit Vaish – Senior Vice President-Corporate Development, Strategy and Investor Relations Peter Kern – Chief Executive Officer Julie Whalen – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Eric Sheridan – Goldman Sachs Naved Khan – Truist Lee Horowitz – Deutsche Bank Kevin Kopelman – Cowen Jack Matten – Wolfe Research Lloyd Wamsley – UBS Mark Mahaney – Evercore ISI Brian Fitzgerald – Wells Fargo Tom Champion – Piper Sandler John Colantuoni – Jefferies Jed Kelly – Oppenheimer Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Expedia Group Q3 2022 Financial Results Teleconference. My name is Nadia, and I'll be your operator for today's call.

title: Expedia (EXPE) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Expedia (EXPE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.11% and 1.84%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Earnings Beat In The Cards For Expedia's Stock?
text: Our forecast indicates that Expedia's valuation is $125 per share, which is 31% higher than the current market price.

title: Expedia (EXPE) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Expedia's (EXPE) Q3 results are likely to reflect gains from increasing gross bookings owing to growing travel demand. Yet, uncertainties related to the pandemic remain a concern.
